blueprint.title: Pet Bandana
blueprint.description:
The custom dog bandana is a great way to add some personality to your pet. These accessories are printable on the front side. Made of soft-spun polyester, the fabric will not bunch or irritate your pet’s skin. While animals already have their own character, a custom pet bandana can help bring things to the next level. All it needs is a stylish design.
.:Material: 100% polyester

.:Available in 2 sizes: 20" × 9.75" (50.8 × 24.8cm) and 27" × 13" (68.6 × 33.0cm)

.:One-sided print

.:Sewn in label

.:Pre-constructed item (size varies +/- 1"(2.5cm))

.:Blank product sourced from China
